heading: Tonight
text: Increasing cloud cover, then more periods of showers spreading northeast, with wet snow showers possible, more likely over the higher hills, and light accumulations possible over the Greens. Lows in the 30s, near 30 across the northern hills. Wind diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Saturday
text: Morning clouds, with a few showers early. A few periods of sunshine, with a chance of localized, passing rain showers through the afternoon. Highs from the upper 40s to mid 50s. Light and variable wind.

heading: Saturday Night
text: Mostly cloudy with periods of clearing. Chance of scattered showers, highest chances over the Greens and higher hills. Cool. Lows through the 30s. Calm wind.
